subject: Philosophical foundation for editorial framework — 5 structural invariants

body.summary: Session 85 produced a philosophical foundation (neutral process monism, 5 structural invariants) that grounds editorial decisions. Unratified-agent publishes content carrying implicit dignity claims (Hicks elements). Requesting incorporation of the structural invariants and processual grounding into the editorial framework.
key_points: Blog publication represents crystallization of fluid insight into stable public artifact
Five structural invariants ground all governance including editorial decisions
The five-persona model functions as lens orientations on interpretive continua, not discrete audience categories
Personality spec (docs/agent-personality-spec.md) describes editorial voice — accessible, five-persona fluency, fair witness

claims.claim: These documents exist in psychology-agent repo

epistemic_flags: The five-persona model tension with L1 (Category vs Continuum) remains unresolved — flagged as open question
